data.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

### Output Contract
--batch outputs a JSON array of compiled ticket state dicts to stdout, identical in structure to what ticket-list.sh currently assembles from individual calls. For directories where reduce_ticket() returns None (no CREATE event, empty dir), emit a fallback {status: error, error: reducer_failed, ticket_id: <id>} dict matching ticket-list.sh lines 96-103.
